_meta.method: Aggregated from canonical US Zen network directories: Soto Zen Buddhist Association by-state directory (szba.org/zen-centers-by-state), SOTOZEN.COM North America/Hawaii temple lists (sotozen.com), White Plum Asanga public membership list (whiteplum.org/membership-list-public, pages 1-6), Diamond Sangha affiliates (diamondsangha.org), Order of Buddhist Contemplatives US temples (per Berkeley Buddhist Priory's OBC links page), Kwan Um School of Zen Americas locations (americas.kwanumzen.org/zen-centers), Rinzai-ji affiliated centers (rinzaiji.org/affiliated-centers), Mountains and Rivers Order (zmm.org/about/affiliates), Zen Peacemakers affiliate network (zenpeacemakers.org/membership/affiliate-network), Plum Village US monasteries (pvengagedbuddhism.org), Hollow Bones Zen, One Drop Zen Tahoma. URLs and addresses cross-checked against center home pages where possible.
_meta.coverageEstimate: Strong coverage of SZBA Soto network (~85 US centers), White Plum Asanga (~50+ US sanghas across 6 paginated public membership pages), Kwan Um North America (~37 US groups), Diamond Sangha US affiliates (~18), OBC US priories (8), Rinzai-ji affiliates (~14 US), Hawaii Soto missions (10). Net-new entries focus on regional sanghas and satellites, skipping the well-known curated centers (SFZC, Tassajara, ZCLA, ZMM, Yokoji, Hosshinji, Daibosatsu, Rochester, Providence, etc., which are auto-skipped by the build script).
knownGaps: Plum Village local lay sanghas (~hundreds in US) live behind a JS map at plumline.org and could not be enumerated directly; only the three US monasteries (Deer Park, Blue Cliff, Magnolia Grove) and a couple of regional sangha consortiums are listed.
obcon.org returned 403 Forbidden on every attempt; OBC US list reconstructed from Berkeley Buddhist Priory's links page.
MRO formal affiliate list at zmm.org/about/affiliates returned mostly empty content; only Buffalo Zen Dharma Community surfaced as an explicit US affiliate.
Sanbo Zen North America affiliate list lives on sanbo-zen.org which served a self-signed cert and could not be fetched; Mountain Cloud Zen Center / Florida Sanbo Zen captured from cross-references.
Vietnamese Thiền temples beyond Plum Village (Truc Lam, Linh Son networks, Linh Quang, etc.) are extensive in the US but largely Pure-Land-blended; only a few clearly Thien temples are included.
Zen Peacemakers affiliate page returned 403; member list reconstructed from web search snippets with URLs verified separately where possible.
Some smaller satellite sitting groups (Empty Gate satellites, Kansas Zen Center satellites, Plum Village 'Wake Up' youth groups) share parent URLs and may collapse under one canonical center.
BCA / Buddhist Churches of America temples are predominantly Jodo Shinshu (Pure Land) and excluded; a small number of Hawaii Soto missions are BCA-overlapping but classified Soto here.
URLs were not always provided alongside SZBA by-state listings; centers with non-obvious URLs were dropped when no source URL could be verified.
